_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.
_publications._context: The GEMM of high-grade PNSTs was generated as described previously. Dhh::Cre, Nf1fl/fl, Pten experimental class animals were randomized to a treatment or vehicle group
